full_description: Focus Mode is an app designed to help users stay focused and productive, providing a distraction-free environment for work, study, or creativity. It includes features for website blocking, time tracking, and goal setting. With Focus Mode, you can customizable block distracting websites, track your time spent on tasks, and set goals for yourself to stay motivated. The app also provides detailed statistics and insights to help you understand your productivity habits and identify areas for improvement. Whether you're a student, professional, or creator, Focus Mode is the perfect tool to help you stay on track and achieve your goals.
